ddls:
CREATE TABLE "household_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the household status (e.g., Chronically Homeless, Not Chronically Homeless) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the household status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the household type (e.g., without_children, with_children_and_adults) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the household type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_types" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population type */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population type (e.g., all_households) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for data collection */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the data collection */,
  "response_rate" TEXT /* Response rate of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question (e.g., Q26a) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset entry */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household status */,
  "total_households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the dataset */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population type */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time period */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household type */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of households of the specified type */,
  "household_members" INTEGER /* Total number of household members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_data_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES household_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_data_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_types ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_data_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_data_household_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_type_id") REFERENCES household_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household data entry */,
  "adults_count" INTEGER /* Number of adults in the household */,
  "children_count" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of household members */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of household members */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution of household members */,
  "income" TEXT /* Household income */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of household members */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of household members */,
  "health_insurance_status" TEXT /* Health insurance status of household members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_demographics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household data entry */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service provided (e.g., shelter, food assistance) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date the service was provided */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_services_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household data entry */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_contacts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household member */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household data entry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the household member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the household member */,
  "relationship_to_head" TEXT /* Relationship to the household head (e.g., self, spouse, child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household member */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service provided (e.g., medical care, counseling) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date the service was provided */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_services_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES household_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., shelter, social services) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
